turning_point.snippet: Hi! Is there anything else I am needing to do to fully cancel our Zoca subscription? I thought that I did everything on the meeting.

signals.snippet: Hi! Is there anything else I am needing to do to fully cancel our Zoca subscription? I thought that I did everything on the meeting.

cause_analysis.narrative: Zaretsky Aesthetics churned on 2026-04-13 after 123 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-03-14 via app_chat — 30 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 30 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

messages.body: Hi, you've reached Dawson Zaretsky. I'm sorry I missed your call. Please leave your name, number, and a brief message and I'll get right back to you.
You should have received a refund already, Jasmine.   Could you please check and confirm?
Hi! When will we recieve our refund?
Hello Jasmine,   We are waiting for you to join us on our meeting we had scheduled today.   Please use this link to join the meeting: https://meet.google.com/ikt-mckh-kkb
Hopping on!

Hi, you've reached Jasmine Zaretsky. I'm sorry I missed your call. Please leave your name, number, and a brief message, and I'll get right back to you. Hello, Jasmine. Santosh calling you from Zoka. Calling in to remind you about the meeting we have scheduled today. The team is waiting for you to talk with. If you can …
Sure, they will be reaching out to you at 1 PM CST today.
Let me do that
Can you give me a call now?
Yes please, This is the CEO’s office Let me know when to call.
Our team is trying to reach out to you. Can you share with me the alternate number so we can call you?
Or email me what we are still needing to do to finalize our cancellation
I still have yet to hear a call back. Is there a number I can call? Also we were charged for another month and that needs to be refunded since we canceled already please.￼

You've reached out. I'm sorry, Mr. Call, please leave your name, number and a brief message and I'll get right back to you. Hey, Jasmine. Can you please give me a call back? I've got to talk about a payment that got deducted. Thank you.
I have time on monday at 1 pm CST
Hi Jasmine,   I tried reaching you over the phone, but couldn't connect with you.   Could you please call me back or let me know a time that works for you?
Hi! Is there anything else I am needing to do to fully cancel our Zoca subscription? I thought that I did everything on the meeting.
The cancellation team has been trying to reach you to verify a few details.   If you have a specific time: I can ask them to ring you up and we can finish the process.
